violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Coke coolers at the Snack Shack were found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Observed food employees in the Hog House and the Snack Shack put on gloves and did not wash their hands first. Hands should be washed before putting on gloves.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. Hand wash station at the Hog House was found blocked with bucket used to collect dirty towels. Handwashing stations should be easily accessible.
